The door
is open.

Black-led organizations, individual builders, funders, and partner institutions: the Coalition is open.

Apply to the Coalition

Institutions, builders, and aligned members. The doctrine must resonate. The door is open to those who come through on their own legs.

Start Application →

Email the Council

General inquiries, partnership proposals, and coalition questions. A member of the Council will respond.

accounts@e5enclave.com

Give to the Work

Tax-deductible donations. $25/month sustains one family on FarmBlock. Every dollar has a specific impact.
